compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Why
Deferred post-deployment measurement for the 2026-07-12 calibration follow-up epic
(9d50-ead1-de68-4362 / unrational-expansive-catfish). That epic ships three
behavior changes — code-review serious-tier blocking (b9c0), the loosened
advisory-remediation guidance (e1f2), and the G7 leaf-parent-containment criterion
(d4cf) — whose *effect* can only be observed as field data AFTER deployment over an
observation window. The epic itself closes on the measurement FRAMEWORK being in
place (its AC2); this ticket records the ACTUAL telemetry once it exists, so the
unobservable-in-session target does not leave the epic in limbo.

## What
Run the measurement queries captured in the epic's measurement-framework comment
after an observation window (target: ~1–2 weeks of post-deploy change traffic) and
record the results as a comment on the epic (and here):

- **Code-review blocking outcome:** count of `LLM-Review: BLOCK — finding` votes and
  the false-block count over the post-flip corpus, from the `REVIEW_RESULT`
  (code_review_result_v1) sidecars in `.tickets-tracker`, compared to the pre-change
  baseline (0 finding-blocks / 162 changes).
- **Plan-review advisory uptake:** advisory `norm_id` survival across review rounds
  (a surviving-then-disappearing advisory = an advisory the agent chose to address),
  and rounds-to-pass, before vs after the e1f2 guidance loosening.
- **G7 fire-rate:** the parent-containment criterion's fire-rate + adjudication from
  its `REVIEW_RESULT` sidecars (feeds d4cf's promotion decision).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] [operator-attested] The post-deployment observation window has elapsed and the
      three measurement queries above have been run against the post-change corpus;
      evidence is a comment recording the actual counts/rates with the query commands
      and the window dates.
- [ ] The results are posted as a comment on epic 9d50-ead1-de68-4362, closing the
      loop on its measurement framework.
compiled_state.title: Deferred: record post-deployment field data for the 2026-07-12 calibration epic
